/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/monalisa.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/monalisa.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monalisa.dir/src/ImageViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monalisa.dir/src/ImageWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monalisa.dir/src/FileHandler.cpp.o -o monalisa  -lstdc++fs /usr/lib/libhyprtoolkit.so /usr/lib/libhyprutils.so /usr/lib/libaquamarine.so /usr/lib/libhyprgraphics.so /usr/lib/libpixman-1.so /usr/lib/libdrm.so /usr/lib/libxkbcommon.so
